def find_closest_elements(numbers):
    result = [None, None]
    distance = float('inf')
    for i in range(len(numbers)):
        for j in range(i + 1, len(numbers)):
            new_distance = abs(numbers[i] - numbers[j])
            if new_distance < distance:
                distance = new_distance
                if numbers[i] < numbers[j]:
                    result[0] = numbers[i]
                    result[1] = numbers[j]
                else:
                    result[0] = numbers[j]
                    result[1] = numbers[i]
    return result
